Pillar_Narratives.Sovereign Financial Stress: This pillar shows moderate stress, primarily manifesting through commodity price volatility affecting national economies. Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: This pillar indicates routine monitoring is appropriate, as direct currency or liquidity crises are not the primary focus of current events. Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: This pillar is elevated due to the rapidly deteriorating diplomatic environment and potential for new punitive measures.
